name: Turkey Waldorf Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Cooked rice; cooled (cooked in chicken broth)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the cooked rice, turkey breast strips, diced apple, sliced celery, slivered almonds, and poppy seed salad dressing.
2. Mix all ingredients until well combined.
3. Serve the mixture over lettuce leaves.
